name: reddid-love-button
description: ReddID Love Button — MV3 browser extension for RDD tips

scripts.build:chrome: web-ext build --source-dir . --artifacts-dir .. --filename "love-button-chrome-{version}.zip" --overwrite-dest --ignore-files CHANGELOG.md PLUGINS.md README.md TESTING.md build-firefox.js gen-icons.js package.json package-lock.json yarn.lock .web-ext-ignore "love-button-firefox" "love-button-firefox/**" "store" "store/**" "icons/src" "icons/src/**"
